title: The Production and Abilities of the Replica Spears
display_title: The Production and Abilities of the Replica Spears
wikitext:
[]: The Production and Abilities of the Replica Spears             Quote Post by boyfrand » Sun Jul 21, 2013 9:26 pm [Cleaned up and expanded the thread title. - Monk] anyone give much thought to the production and abilities of the replica spears? do you think their production was unknown to nerv? i'm not really sure when they would have been produced because apparently the LoL was just hanging out in antartica (were they studying it there?), then moved to tokyo-3 to impale lilith, then launched into space, where it remained untiil EoE. i just rewatched Asuka's battle in EoE, and it appears that the spear successfully pierces her at field, but it clearly doesn't destroy her completely (when Rei threw it into space, did the LoL seek out the angel's core or was Rei really good at javelin throwing?), it just goes into her skull. why not her core?

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Mon Jul 22, 2013 12:28 am Apparently during the Katsuragi expedition they actually removed the LoL from Adam, sent it to the Dead Sea region and then shipped it back to Antarctica and stabbed it back in Adam for the Contact Experiment, in EoE they talk about pulling out the spear. I once theorized that the Spear they sent back to Antarctica was a (the first) replica and not the original, which was kept by Seele and later sent to Nerv in Japan. Since they removing the Spear out of Adam didn't cause her to activate or do nothing whatsoever (the same can be seen with Lilith, the spear only seems to prevent her from regenerating her legs) and took all the trouble of sending it back to Antarctica only to spear Adam again for the CE with the Katsuragi donor, I proposed that they intended it to keep Adam from activating when actually performing the CE itself, since what they got back was a fake Adam did indeed activate and caused 2nd Impact. They probably did the same with Lilith (only this time with the real spear) in order to produce Rei, they dove some of Yui's DNA on Lilith's speared body it reacted and formed a Rei body using Lilith's marshmallow matter and Lilith's soul split itself among both bodies.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon Jul 22, 2013 1:01 am It's interesting to note that the replica Spears carried by the MP Evas bubble up and produce little legs when Eva-01 stops 3I. They look suspiscously like the small legs growing out of Lilith's waist, and the script identifies the substance they turn into as LCL: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by boyfrand » Tue Jul 23, 2013 3:45 pm i never noticed that about the replica spears before! however, maybe the spears are reacting that way because they are interacting with the cores of the massive production units?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Jul 23, 2013 4:01 pm boyfrand wrote: i just rewatched Asuka's battle in EoE, and it appears that the spear successfully pierces her at field, but it clearly doesn't destroy her completely (when Rei threw it into space, did the LoL seek out the angel's core or was Rei really good at javelin throwing?), it just goes into her skull. why not her core?

[]:             Quote Post by Malevolo » Tue Jul 23, 2013 5:40 pm Bagheera wrote: Now that I think about it, I wonder if the Lance has a soul? That might explain why the replicas weren't sentient, same as the Rei clones weren't people on account of lacking souls. That would make for a nice symmetry between the Eva project and the replica lances.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Jul 23, 2013 6:24 pm Malevolo wrote: The only problem would be whom a soul would be put into the lance, because the only replica souls we know are the dummy plugs, and them another problems arises, whom do you put a soul into a replica lance without all the computing necessary to subdue a replica soul (dummy plug)

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Tue Jul 23, 2013 6:41 pm Wait, there was some scepticism as to whether the LoL had a soul in the first place? I hadn't thought the replicas didn't have souls though, if I thought about I would have assumed they had castrated or overridden ones, like the Harpies do. To be honest, and even though this sounds a bit silly, but since the Lances are alive, and have souls, perhaps they aren't merely the instruments and servants of the Ancestors, but the Ancestors themselves?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Jul 23, 2013 6:54 pm Lavinius wrote: Wait, there was some scepticism as to whether the LoL had a soul in the first place?

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Tue Jul 23, 2013 7:08 pm Bagheera wrote: I've never even seen it suggested before, but perhaps it's old hat and I missed it.

[]:             Quote Post by Malevolo » Tue Jul 23, 2013 11:16 pm Lavinius wrote: It just seemed pretty obvious to me... they're alive and intelligent, and clearly organic, not machines, so of course they have souls.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Jul 24, 2013 12:20 am Shinoyami65 wrote: It's interesting to note that the replica Spears carried by the MP Evas bubble up and produce little legs when Eva-01 stops 3I. They look suspiscously like the small legs growing out of Lilith's waist, and the script identifies the substance they turn into as LCL: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Jul 24, 2013 1:06 am Malevolo wrote: I concur with Lavinius. And to penetrate an AT Field like they do, without a powerful energy source (like a positron canon), they need a way to do it. We see them adapting to Asuka AT Field so they can cross it, well if they have a hardwired replica soul (like the souls on the harpys), are organic, they need a AT Field to maintain the shape, and change their shape so can cross one.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Jul 24, 2013 1:14 am Chuckman wrote: Are those legs, or greebles that makeup the explosion effect?

[]:             Quote Post by boyfrand » Thu Aug 01, 2013 8:52 pm Well, since the replica lances don't have AT fields, they most likely don't have souls. So Seele figured out how to create a weapon that pierces an AT field without using another AT field to corrode/erode it. Do you think they had recently created the technology or were they hiding it from Nerv Japan so they couldn't use it against Seele?

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Fri Aug 02, 2013 10:08 am You guys know what would be really boss? Is if instead if piloting Evas, they pilot Lance replicas instead. Would probably be much more effective.
